subject: Associate anchor to schema set
commit_message:
Associate anchor to schema set

- db schema updated
- db layer tests provided for ancor create and reading by dataspace
- anchor model is removed from rest api as extra
- api/spi updated to use string references instead of object

Issue-ID: CPS-99
Change-Id: Ideeb83fa9e91ec1816308d8327a6589b999c64c5
Signed-off-by: Ruslan Kashapov <ruslan.kashapov@pantheon.tech>

Hi Ruslan, can you reply to my comment re the names of the test methods?

Patch Set 19:

> Hi Ruslan, can you reply to my comment re the names of the test methods?

we can provide human readable labels to tests (methods)
via @label annotation but it requires junit 5 (needs migration with minor updates), 
current implementation is using junit 4 which is provided
by default as spring-boot-test dependency

for now this seems to be out of scope for entire task
